title: Mies van der Rohe, Seagram Building
topic_path: Mies van der Rohe, Seagram Building

assessment_items.question_content:
**The [[☃ dropdown 1]] and [[☃ dropdown 2]] of the Seagram Building characterize modernist architecture.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bc517fda68128b685babb9c7d28371d8.jpg)
hints: **The simplified geometry and monumental vertical ascent characterize modernist architecture.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**The references to [[☃ dropdown 1]] structures reveal a desire to balance [[☃ dropdown 2]] traditions with industrial materials and modern forms.**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bc517fda68128b685babb9c7d28371d8.jpg)
hints: **The references to ancient structures reveal a desire to balance classical traditions with industrial materials and modern forms.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Mies used expensive materials and the facade’s sculptural mullions to create symbolic meaning.**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bc517fda68128b685babb9c7d28371d8.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **Mies used expensive materials and the façade’s sculptural mullions for symbolic meaning.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Mies van der Rohe situated the Seagram Building on the site in a way that [[☃ dropdown 1]] the surrounding architecture.**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bc517fda68128b685babb9c7d28371d8.jpg)
hints: **Mies situated the Seagram Building on the site in a way that respects the surrounding architecture, while also providing a corridor for viewing his building.**
